agaadha: And *that* is why Canadian byo-yomi makes no damn sense...
C[agaadha: In a way, it does the opposite of what time control systems are meant to do...

agaadha: The reason game clocks evolved from absolute time was to eliminate time losses that could occur even if the amount of time spent thinking and playing was trivial, because even if you react as fast as possible, your clock will tick down a bit.
agaadha: Canadian byo-yomi doesn't get rid of that... in fact, it makes it possible for it occur repeatedly over the course of a game...
agaadha: It's doing the opposite of its job!
